title: What a godly man does with his phone (it's not a detox)
caption:
A weekend without your phone is a detox. A man of faith needs a war.

The phone is where lust lives, where envy lives, where your time dies. It feeds all of it — all day, all at once. And the answer isn't 'take a break.' It's: something is actively trying to own you, and you're not going to let it.

Four moves. Cut the access route, not just the habit. Replace the first thing you feed in the morning. Get one man on it who'll ask the hard question Monday.

"If your right hand causes you to sin, cut it off." — Matthew 5:30. Not manage. Cut.

Save this. Send it to the brother who keeps 'taking breaks.'

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #phonefasting #selfcontrol #scripture
